title: Order&AuctionSystem
description: The ultimate economy solution combining a high-performance Auction House with a dynamic player-driven Order system. Let your players sell items or create custom buy-requests with ease—all secured by a virtual vault and CoinsEngine integration.
body:
📦 Auction&Order-System
The ultimate all-in-one economy solution! Combining a powerful Auction House with a dynamic player-driven Request System.

⚖️ Auction House
Experience a seamless trading experience with a high-performance GUI.

Smart Search & Sort: Find what you need by name, seller, or price.

Moderation: Admins can instantly remove items via Shift+Right-Click.

No Losses: Expired items are safely moved to your personal Vault.

📦 Order System (Requests)
Turn the market around! Instead of just selling, tell the community what you need.

Create Orders: Need bulk materials? Set a price and let others farm for you.

Partial Delivery: Suppliers get paid instantly per item delivered.

Secure Payment: Coins are held in escrow to guarantee fair trades.

🔒 The Virtual Vault
Your safety net for all transactions.

Inventory Full? Items are automatically stored in the Vault.

Offline Support: Claim your rewards and items even after being offline.

🚀 Key Features
Smart Numbers: Supports shorthand like 1k, 5m, or 10b for easier typing.

Full Customization: 100% of messages and GUIs are configurable.

Dual-Prefix Design: Visual distinction between AH (Gold) and Orders (Aqua).

⚠️ Dependencies
This plugin requires CoinsEngine to function.

💻 Quick Commands
/ah - Open Auction House (/ah sell, /ah search, /ah tresor)

/order - Open Order Board (/order create, /order search, /order tresor)

/ah reload - Reload configuration (system.ah.admin)

Developed for modern Minecraft economies. Fast. Secure. Simple.
